projects.title: BDPark - parking management for admin and customers
projects.bodyText:
- Bill calculation, parking history and gate/LPR/CCTV control
 -  Registering discounts, season tickets and monitor spending
 - Card payment handling using PaymentKorea and Smartro.
 - Connecting POS to VAN for user IC card I/O interactions and payment processes.

projects.title: BDApp - fire panel control
projects.bodyText:
- User interface for staffs to monitor and control statuses of fire sensors in a building.
 - Central on-premise server managing IOT controllers and receiving real-time data for display and control.
 - Using FCM/APNS server for transfering push notifications.
 - Multiplatform app development using MAUI

projects.title: BDAdmin - internal tool for services management
projects.bodyText:
- Internal admin dashboard for configurations, locations and settings of BDApp and BDPark services.
 - Manage users, connections, metrics, controller health and send test push notifications,...
 - Database, logs and realtime data management.

projects.title: Medical Information Simulations - Medical Tests QC Software
projects.bodyText:
- Simulation for medical test quality controls in pathogenic labs.
 - Manage quality control tests in a database, print PDF, record past metrics.
 - Built for teachers and students to practice on real pathogen lab processes.

projects.title: GeneHub
projects.bodyText:
- A search engine for Genes, Diseases and Pathogens, data linked directly to US government websites.
 - Search information about diseases, clinical trials, symptomps and treatments.

projects.title: Tea2Go
projects.bodyText:
- A tea shop ordering platform built with React Native and a React admin dashboard.
 - Customers browse nearby locations via Google Maps, authenticate with OAuth and make payments using in-app purchases.
 - Manages store locations, holiday hours, convenience fees, and scheduled push notifications.
